commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
A magician . whose name was Bar-jesu, son of Jesus, or Josue. In Arabic, Elymas is the same as magician. This man did all he could to dissuade the proconsul, Sergius Paulus, from embracing the Christian faith. (Witham)
Sala mina was the capital of the island of Cyprus, and at the eastern extremity, as Paphos was at the western. A. D. 45.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Both he and that other magician, who was with Sergius Paulus, (since he began opposing himself to the same apostles) was mulcted with loss of eyes.
